name: localClash Default
description: Aethersailor-like default policy using GEOSITE packs and GEOIP coverage for common categories.

patches.description: Add direct and regional exit proxy groups.
Add reject, private, tracker, PT, download, and China direct baseline packs.
Add the Dashboard-visible QUIC main policy group and high-priority UDP/443 rule.
Add communication and social media business groups.
Add ChatGPT, AI, GitHub, and speed-test business groups.
Add Apple, Google, Microsoft, TikTok, and streaming media groups.
Add Bahamut and generic game-platform routing.
Add entertainment, ecommerce, fallback, and China direct tail routing.
